Layer.WallCommand: %function(self) local state = math.random(0,3) + 13; self:animate(0); self:setstate(state); end
Layer.Jump1Command: %function(self) local state = math.random(0,3) + 5; self:animate(0); self:setstate(state); end
Layer.Jump3Command: %function(self) local state = math.random(0,3) + 9; self:animate(0); self:setstate(state); end
